title: A community based clinical trial to study the effects of Racecadotril and standard care versus standard care alone in children below 5 years of age with diarrhoea
inclusion_criteria: Inclusion:Child 4-59 months, with acute watery diarrhoea <1 week duration,with three or more stools in a 24 hour period, not requiring intravenous rehydration, resident in Kasba/Ramanaickanpalayam, with parents willing for enrollment.
exclusion_criteria: Child <4 months or >60 months, not resident in Kasba/ Ramanaickanpalayam, bloody diarrhoea, diarrhoea requiring intravenous rehydration, diarrhoea >1 week duration, not willing for enrollment
